description_long: This object is a lever-action rifle with a classic design, featuring a wooden stock and forearm with a rich brown finish. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and traditional appearance. The rifle has a tubular magazine running beneath the barrel, characteristic of many lever-action firearms. The lever loop is prominent and metallic, positioned just behind the trigger guard for manual cycling of the action. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the barrel, with a front post and a rear notch for aiming. The overall build is streamlined and functional, suitable for both display and practical use in an urban or rural setting.
description: A classic lever-action rifle with a wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and iron sights. The design is traditional, with a tubular magazine and prominent lever loop.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, lever, and metal barrel.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the narrow profile and alignment of the barrel and tubular magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, lever, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: View from the buttstock end, emphasizing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
